concerns.text: Task T015 ('Implement retrieval logic using cosine similarity on object captions for Fine store') is marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on T012 (LLM captioning) and T013 (Fine store construction). The Fine store cannot be queried until it is constructed and populated with captions. This violates the 'Producer before Consumer' rule and makes the [P] tag incorrect.

Task T014 ('Implement retrieval logic... for Coarse/Medium') is marked [P] but depends on T009 (Coarse store) and T010 (Medium store). Retrieval logic cannot be implemented or tested without the existence of the stores it queries. The [P] tag is invalid here.

Task T016 ('Implement CPU-optimized LLM inference') is marked [US1] but lacks a [P] tag, yet it logically depends on T014/T015 (retrieval) to provide context. However, the description implies it runs the inference engine. If it includes the *orchestration* of retrieval+inference, it depends on T014/T015. If it is just the engine, it is independent. Given T019 is the orchestrator, T016 is likely the engine. However, T016 is listed *after* T014/T015, which is correct, but the lack of explicit dependency on the *output* of T014/T015 (retrieved context) in the task description creates ambiguity. More critically, T019 (Orchestrator) depends on T016, T014, and T015. T019 is correctly placed last. The issue is the [P] tags on T014/T015 which are false.

Task T020 ('Implement accuracy calculation') is marked [P] but depends on T016 (Inference) which generates the answers to be evaluated. Accuracy cannot be calculated without the AnswerSet produced by T016. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T022 ('Implement paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test') is marked [P] but depends on T020 (Accuracy calculation) to provide the accuracy distributions. Statistical testing cannot occur before the data is calculated. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T027 ('Integrate strict memory monitoring hooks') is marked [P] but depends on T016 (Inference implementation) to inject hooks into. You cannot integrate hooks into a module that does not yet exist or is not yet implemented. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T029 ('Implement chunked processing') is marked [P] but depends on T019 (Main orchestrator) or the core data loading logic to modify. Chunking is an implementation detail of the processing loop, which is defined in T019 or T006. If T029 modifies T019, it cannot be parallel to T019. If it modifies T006, it depends on T006. The [P] tag is likely incorrect or the task is ambiguous.
